src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/C.general_idea: Exclude DataSourceAutoConfiguration to prevent Spring Boot from attempting to configure a database connection that is not present or needed.
Enable Spring Cloud OpenFeign clients to allow declarative REST client creation for service-to-service communication.

src/main/java/org/folio/circulationbff/c.general_idea: Replace Lombok @AllArgsConstructor with @RequiredArgsConstructor to enforce explicit final field declarations for better code clarity and maintainability.
Update imports to use the project's own domain DTOs and service classes instead of external or generic ones, aligning with the new module structure.
Implement the postEcsRequestExternal endpoint to handle external ECS request creation.
Implement the getPickSlips endpoint to fetch pick slips by service point ID.
Implement the getSearchSlips endpoint to fetch search slips by service point ID.
Implement the getExternalUsers endpoint to retrieve external user details.
Update the getAllowedServicePoints endpoint to accept additional parameters (tenantId, instanceId, requestId, requesterId, itemId) and use a builder pattern for request params.
Implement the circulationBffRequestsSearchInstancesGet endpoint to search for instances, returning a single result or an empty object.
Implement the saveAndConfirmMediatedRequest endpoint to handle creation and confirmation of mediated requests.
Implement the createRequest endpoint to create a new circulation request.
Implement the checkInByBarcode endpoint to handle item check-ins.
Implement the checkOutByBarcode endpoint to handle item check-outs.
Add an exception handler for HttpFailureFeignException to forward error responses from downstream services.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Java EE/Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 compatibility.
Replace deprecated @WebMvcTest and @ContextConfiguration with @SpringBootTest and @AutoConfigureMockMvc to align with modern Spring Boot testing standards.
Use @DynamicPropertySource to configure test properties dynamically, replacing static initializer patterns for better integration with Spring Boot 3.x test context.
Switch from Spring-managed WireMock bean to static initialization with TestSocketUtils to ensure port availability and compatibility with new test context lifecycle.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.human_impl: protected static WireMockServer wireMockServer = new WireMockServer(findAvailableTcpPort());

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Introduce FolioExecutionContextSetter to properly manage execution context in tests, reflecting changes in how FOLIO modules handle context in newer versions.
Update header construction to use single values instead of lists for tenant IDs and add URL headers, aligning with updated Okapi client expectations.
Add helper method to set up tenant configuration via MockMvc before tests, ensuring proper module registration in the test environment.
Introduce a shared ObjectMapper configuration for JSON serialization in tests to ensure consistent formatting and handling of nulls/dates.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.human_impl: private static final ObjectMapper OBJECT_MAPPER = new ObjectMapper() ...

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Add utility methods for building HTTP requests with tokens and headers to simplify test code and handle authentication changes.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.human_impl: protected ResultActions doPostWithTenant(String url, Object payload, String tenantId) ...

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Replace a single basic status check test with a comprehensive suite of integration tests covering various ECS/TLR routing scenarios for allowed service points.
src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.human_impl: Replaced `allowedServicePointsReturnsOkStatus` with five new tests: `callsCirculationWhenEcsTlrDisabled`, `callsTlrWhenEcsTlrEnabledInCentralTenant`, `allowedSpCallsDataTenantCirculationWhenEcsTlrEnabledWithoutRequestId`, `allowedSpCallsDataTenantCirculationWhenEcsTlrEnabledWithRequestIdWithoutECSPhase`, and `allowedSpCallsDataTenantCirculationWhenEcsTlrEnabledWithRequestIdWithECSPhase`.

src/test/java/org/folio/circulationbff/a.general_idea: Add WireMock static imports to support request verification and stubbing in the new test cases.
Add Spring MockMvc result matcher import to verify JSON response structure in tests.
Add domain DTO imports to construct mock objects for user tenants, requests, and allowed service points.
Add Lombok annotation import to simplify exception handling in test methods.
Add standard library imports for Set and UUID used in test data generation.
Remove unused helper method and string constants that were only used by the old simple test.
Update constant names and values to reflect the new API paths and logic tested.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version to 3.4.3, which is required for Java 21 compatibility and provides updated dependencies.
Update the FOLIO Spring support library version to 9.0.0 to match the new Spring Boot version and Java 21 requirements.
Replace the deprecated 'folio-spring-base' dependency with 'folio-spring-support' to align with the new library structure.
Add the 'folio-spring-system-user' dependency to support system user functionality in the updated framework.
Add the Spring Boot validation starter to enable Bean Validation support.
Add the Spring Boot cache starter to enable caching support.
Add Spring Cloud OpenFeign starter to support declarative REST clients.
Add MapStruct library and its annotation processor for type-safe bean mapping.
Add the MapStruct annotation processor to generate mapper implementations at compile time.
Upgrade WireMock test dependency to version 3.12.1 for better compatibility and features.
Upgrade Testcontainers dependency to version 1.20.6 for improved container management in tests.
Update the OpenAPI generator configuration to point to the new specification file name.
Change the package names for generated API and model classes to reflect the new module structure.
Increment the project version to 1.1.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new development cycle.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from OpenJDK 17 to OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Add a missing newline at the end of the Dockerfile to comply with POSIX standards.

Jenkinsfile.general_idea: Switch the Jenkins build node label to target a Java 21 agent instead of Java 17.

descriptors/ModuleDescriptor-template.js.general_idea: Add required dependency on the pick-slips interface to support pick slip functionality.
Add required dependency on the search-slips interface to support search slip functionality.
Add required dependency on the search interface to support instance searching.
Add required dependency on the consortium-search interface for cross-tenant searching.
Add required dependency on the user-tenants interface to manage user tenant relationships.
Add required dependency on the users interface to access user data.
Add required dependency on the login interface for authentication management.
Add required dependency on the permissions interface to manage user permissions.
Add required dependency on the item-storage interface to access item data.
Add required dependency on the holdings-storage interface to access holdings data.
Add required dependency on the locations interface to access location data.
Add required dependency on the location-units interface to access library/campus/institution data.
Add required dependency on the service-points interface to access service point data.
Add required dependency on the material-types interface to access material type data.
Add required dependency on the circulation interface to support core circulation operations.
Add required dependency on the circulation-settings interface to access circulation settings.
Add required dependency on the instance-storage interface to access instance data.
Add optional dependency on tlr-staff-slips for staff slip generation.
Add optional dependency on tlr-settings for TLR configuration.
Add optional dependency on requests-mediated for mediated request handling.
Add optional dependency on ecs-request-external for external ECS requests.
Add optional dependency on requests-mediated-actions for mediated request actions.
Add optional dependency on ecs-tlr-allowed-service-points for allowed service point resolution.
Add optional dependency on ecs-tlr for TLR request handling.
Add provided interface for creating external ECS requests.
Add provided interface for retrieving pick slips.
Add provided interface for retrieving search slips.
Add provided interface for retrieving external users.
Add provided interface for loans operations including check-in and check-out.
Update the _tenant system interface version from 1.0 to 2.0.
Define system user permissions for internal module operations.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Exclude JDBC and Hibernate auto-configuration classes to prevent startup failures in a non-database application.
Explicitly disable Liquibase to avoid initialization errors when no database is configured.
Disable Mustache template location check to allow startup without template resources.
Change Jackson default property inclusion from non_empty to non_null to align with stricter serialization standards.
Add configuration for secure tenant ID environment variable.
Add configuration block for system user credentials and permissions.
Add missing newline at the end of the file to comply with POSIX standards.
